title: Nagpur, Maharashtra — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nagpur, Maharashtra: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nagpur is a city in Maharashtra with a population of 2,800,000. The geographic center of India, known for its oranges, tiger reserves, and as the winter capital of Maharashtra.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
